nasb.text: and you shall be to Me a kingdom of priests and a holy nation.’ These are the words that you shall speak to the sons of Israel.”

esv.text: and you shall be to me a kingdom of priests and a holy nation.’ These are the words that you shall speak to the people of Israel.”

cnv.text: 你們要歸我作君尊的祭司和聖潔的國民。’這些話你都要對以色列人說。”

ccb.text: 你们要归于我，作祭司之国、圣洁之邦。这些话你要告诉以色列人。’”
